flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at West Virginia Northern Community College rose 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.9k → $10.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at West Virginia Northern Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at West Virginia Northern Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (841 → 1.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at West Virginia Northern Community College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (51.5% → 61.2%).
